title: stelis patinaria
intro: Stelis patinaria, also known as the Patina Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Stelis patinaria include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Stelis patinaria can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
